summary: Frontend-only testing of Genesys Info X premium cinematic website enhancements. All features tested are working correctly including hero logo effects, glass-morphism cards, mega menu navigation, page routing, and scroll animations.

minor.issue: MOCKED - Backend contact endpoint is not implemented (expected as per test request)

critical_code_review_comments: All premium cinematic styling is correctly implemented in App.css
Reveal.js animation component uses framer-motion with proper spring configuration
Glass-morphism effects use proper backdrop-filter and gradient backgrounds
Hero logo has ambient glow pulse animation, dual light sweep effect, and 3D hover tilt
Section titles have gradient text effect
Premium scrollbar with green gradient is defined in index.css
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend premium styling fully tested. Key features verified: hero-logo-premium container with glow and sweep animations, spotlight-card/industry-card/info-card/stack-card with glass-morphism, mega menu dropdowns, all 4 pages (/, /technology, /healthcare, /semiconductors) load correctly, FAQ accordion, contact form inputs work, footer with proper styling.

hero_logo_cinematic_effect.details: hero-logo-premium container found with hero-logo-glow layer and hero-logo-sweep animation. 3D hover tilt CSS defined.

premium_card_styling.details: All card types (spotlight-card, industry-card, info-card, stack-card, cap-card, exclusive-card, faq-item) have glass-morphism effects with gradient backgrounds, backdrop blur, and inset shadows.

navigation_mega_menu.details: Industries, Solutions, Company, Resources dropdowns all open/close properly on hover with glass-morphism styling.

scroll_triggered_animations.details: Reveal.js component triggers on scroll with blur, scale, rotateX entry effects.

header_cta_button.details: Talk to an Expert button has gradient background, hover effects with light sweep animation.

premium_scrollbar.details: Custom scrollbar defined in index.css with green gradient thumb.
